Premise stale on main: Claude Agent SDK 0.3.207 declares peer @anthropic-ai/sdk >=0.93.0, and main's lockfile resolves 0.111.0 — peer satisfied (the 0.81.0 it cited only survives on the pre-upgrade plan branch). Added a durable version-lock floor guard (sdk-version-lock.test.ts). Also fixed a red-main defect the guard exposed: the inline comparator indexed arrays under noUncheckedIndexedAccess (tsgo error; vitest missed it). Branch fix/upgrade-review-followups2 (59fd3814). pnpm check + contract tests green.

Modeled the full OpenCode 1.17.18 event surface: expanded OpenCodeEventSchema from 19 consumed events to all 89 real-server event types (from a live /doc capture), so the contract is an explicit catalog of available event data (70 added, documentation-only: permission.v2.*, question.v2.*, session.next.* family, tui.*, integration.*, workspace/worktree.*, etc.). Then wired a fail-closed observability decode at the SSE ingestion boundary: decode failure warns (drift/new-event signal) but always forwards raw — never drops live traffic. Branch fix/upgrade-review-followups2 (e2860255, 2820a92b). Authored via gpt-5.5, reviewed+verified: pnpm check + 967 unit tests + 83 contract tests green.

Refreshed the OpenAPI snapshot to OpenCode 1.17.18. 1.17.18 renamed event schema ids dotted->PascalCase (Event.permission.asked -> EventPermissionAsked), removed SyncEvent and /global/sync-event, and grew ~8->162 paths. Chose the full snapshot (matches user's 'see everything' preference and the prior snapshot was itself a full capture): replaced fixture with a full live /doc (162 paths, 472 schemas) and updated all assertions to PascalCase/new paths across openapi-snapshot, tool-state-machine, permission-flow, question-flow. Branch fix/upgrade-review-followups2 (55aac9f7). pnpm test:contract green (83/83) vs a live 1.17.18 server.

Added the missing ingestion-boundary decode tests (the gap that let the permission/messageID drift ship uncaught): a schema-valid event forwards with no warning; an event failing OpenCodeEventSchema decode still forwards raw (never dropped) but emits a drift warning. Excess-unread-field tolerance was already covered in opencode-sdk.test.ts (opaque-properties extension), and missing-required-field fail-closed is tested there too. Branch fix/upgrade-review-followups2 (64dd009d). Remaining nicety (not done): loading captured JSON fixture files vs inline objects — low value given the live /doc contract test + full snapshot already exercise real shapes.
Fixed as 711c6a56 on ds/provider-orchestration-cleanup, cherry-picked to main as ff7e01ad, pushed; pnpm check verified green on main.

Landed on ds/provider-orchestration-cleanup: 8fe89cc6 (fingerprint canonicalizer), 675549d6 (injected clock/id + durable receipt authoritative dedupe + restart replay + mismatch rejection; legacy CommandReceiptRepository deleted), 8fe137db (narrow bootstrap + tombstones; command-id propagation verified). pnpm check/lint/build green, 5635 unit tests pass.

Landed on ds/provider-orchestration-cleanup: d8c7ec6f (reactor is single executor of committed side effects + ProviderRuntimeIngestion handoff + drain() quiescence through production wiring), 512f3c0b (deterministic backoff via injected Clock, TestClock-proven), 6aa41543 (IdempotencySetTag deleted + 5 durable-orchestration guardrails in runtime-boundary-grep). All gates green incl. full unit suite 5640.

Epic complete: all 5 children closed. Durable provider orchestration landed on ds/provider-orchestration-cleanup (8 commits over origin/main): session binding behind durable read model, mandatory ingestion seam, injected clock/id, effective-dispatch fingerprint, durable receipts as authoritative dedupe w/ restart replay + mismatch rejection, tombstone bootstrap, reactor as single side-effect executor w/ TestClock-proven backoff, legacy modules deleted + 5 static guardrails. Awaiting phase-3 full-suite gate + codex review before merge.

Resolved via option 6/2 (split; decode-with-warn). (b) capabilities probe: added best-effort observability decode of query.initializationResult() against ClaudeSDKInitializationResultSubsetSchema — validates consumed fields, logs drift, keeps raw value with ?? [] fallbacks, never fail-closes. Compile-time AssertExtends<SDKControlInitializeResponse, schema> keeps it honest; ProbeDeps gains optional logger for testability. (a) opaque Claude message content: left opaque by decision — envelope already boundary-decoded fail-loud (decodeProviderMessage), nested BetaMessage opaque by design, .id read falls back to .uuid; peer product pingdotgg/t3code (same Effect Schema contracts + claude-agent-sdk) makes the same opaque-passthrough choice. Commit 412dcd97 on branch fix/upgrade-review-followups2; pnpm check green, 309 claude+contracts unit tests green.

Implemented option 2: claim-loser polls durable receipt until terminal (Clock-injected, TestClock-proven, two-executor concurrency proof). Commits 2e9cdd39 + 17ca4a7a on ds/claim-loser-poll. Codex review: 1 finding fixed (poll-option clamp), 1 rejected (pre-existing engine crash-policy code).

All five upgrade-review follow-ups (o6r, 8g7, y9w, 6lf, egf) closed. Live smoke is credential-gated (per-provider) and run out-of-band. Closed per user direction.

sessionErrorText fix implemented + tested; model-id issue is upstream catalog/region reality, workaround documented
